name: /space-export redacts user identifier fields (email, username, hostname) from exported metric records
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/space && printf '{"id":"m1","value":1,"user":"alice@example.com","hostname":"laptop-1"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/space/collected.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-export.sh" --collected .claude-tdd-pro/space/collected.jsonl --out export.json 2>err.txt && ! grep -q 'alice@example.com' export.json && ! grep -q 'laptop-1' export.json && grep -q '"id":"m1"' export.json && echo ok 1>&2
